action.reasoning: Observation: Best balanced accuracy improved from 0.8036 to 0.8346 with balanced softmax + EMA. Few-shot accuracy (0.7639) is the weakest link. Model peaked at epoch 13 suggesting overfitting. Analysis: Key improvements needed: (1) better regularization (drop path), (2) better LR schedule (cosine with warmup), (3) larger batch size for more stable gradients, (4) label smoothing. The cRT stage 2 hurt performance so I'll skip it and focus on better stage 1 training. Decision: Train ConvNeXt with drop_path=0.1, cosine schedule with warmup, batch_size=128, EMA decay=0.9995, label_smoothing=0.1 for 50 epochs.
